name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Windows)
notes: This building block detects programs run as Administrator or by another user.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Attempt, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Token Elevation Type (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches "Token Elevation Type" in ('%%1937', '%%1938') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Attempt, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Token Elevation Type (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches "Token Elevation Type" in ('%%1937', '%%1938') AQL filter query
